hero_subtitle: Join Philanthropic Project International (PPI) in making a lasting impact on health, education, and community development.
ppi_presentation: Founded in 2013, PPI is an NGO committed to improving the living conditions of disadvantaged populations in Togo. Our approach is based on community participation, transparency, and respect for human dignity.
Choose where your support goes with full: Choose where your support goes with full transparency.
Support collective initiatives in educat: Support collective initiatives in education, health, and development.
Provide direct help to children, the sic: Provide direct help to children, the sick, and people with disabilities.
projects_intro: Discover the collective actions implemented by PPI on the field. Choose a project you care about and contribute directly to improving the living conditions of the communities.
No projects available at the moment.
Your contribution directly funds the act: Your contribution directly funds the activities of this specific project.

vulnerable_intro: Discover the stories of the people supported by PPI. Your financial support is transparently directed to the dedicated fund for the category of the person you choose to help.
No profiles available in this category.

A world where vulnerable communities hav: A world where vulnerable communities have the power to thrive independently.
To improve the living conditions of disa: To improve the living conditions of disadvantaged populations in Togo through health, education, and community development.
Transparency, Dignity, Community Partici: Transparency, Dignity, Community Participation, and Sustainability.
We intervene mainly in rural areas of To: We intervene mainly in rural areas of Togo, focusing on sustainable and community-driven actions.
Improving access to clean water and medi: Improving access to clean water and medical care.

At PPI, we believe trust is earned. We u: At PPI, we believe trust is earned. We use a unique financial model based on the "specification of donation".
We display the specific bank account ass: We display the specific bank account assigned to each community project or vulnerable category. When you donate, your funds bypass general administrative pots and go straight to the dedicated account.
We strictly protect the dignity and priv: We strictly protect the dignity and privacy of the vulnerable individuals we present. Consent is obtained for all images and stories shared on our platform.
contact_intro: If you have questions or want to support our mission, please reach out using the details below.
